name: construction project managers handling 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate cost estimates cause budget overruns. We automate cost estimation instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cost estimates leading to budget overruns
features: input project plans in various formats
generate cost estimates based on input data
provide a summary report of estimates
